title: CustomBlocks
description: Add your own custom blocks to minecraft
body:
# **Overview:**
With the CustomBlocks plugin you can add your own blocks to minecraft only using a plugin on your server and a texturepack for your clients.

A few messages are still hardcoded in the plugin so you need to compile it from source for yourself if you want to change thoose messages or simply wait until I release an update to change that. Thanks


## **Supported versions:**
- 1.21
- more comming soon (feel free to ask for a specific version or make a pull request)

## **Known issues**
- Rejoining during the pack loading phase makes the player spectator
- Windcharges do destroy the blocks without dropping
- Block updates are disabled

## **List of features and limitations:**
- Blocks with custom texture
- Blocks are accessible via the **stonecutter**. Just put your vanilla item in there
- Blocks are purely decorative so no block adds new functions, but it will inherit the functionallity from the _representator block_
- A texturepack is requiered and the plugin needs to know witch is what. You can download an template texturepack with a compiler script [here](https://files.nauren.de/EmtyCustomBlocks.zip). The compiler is right know **only for Linux/MacOS**. Unfortunatly a bit of knowledge is requiered to use the compiler correctly, I will release a proper explaination/tutorial soon. If you want to lean how it works feel free to contact me on Discord **_palmarhealer_** ![Discord logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3422a54fe5d5b3164f5bcf338bb9787d7e3721b.png)

##   **But take a look for yourself:**
